name: Banana Meringue Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat egg whites until slightly stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add sugar and cream of tartar, continuing to beat. Add vanilla extract and salt; beat until the mixture forms stiff peaks.
4. Spray a 9-inch x 9-inch glass baking dish with non-stick cooking spray.
5. Spread the meringue evenly over the bottom and sides of the dish to form a crust.
6. Bake at 300°F for 45 minutes, or until set. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
7. Prepare the pudding mix according to package directions. Fold in the sliced bananas.
8. Pour the pudding mixture into the crust and sprinkle the ground graham cracker squares on top.
9. Chill before serving.
